{{CargoRelic
|name=Christophor Piano
|class_id=22406
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=05-29
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On May 29, 1709 AD, Christophor made the first piano.<br>Before the invention of the piano, the harpsichord was a popular musical instrument that used quills to pluck the strings. Christophor revolutionized this instrument by replacing the quills with hammers, making it a struck-string instrument. This improved the expressiveness, tonal range, and control of the sound, playing a crucial role in the evolution of musical instruments.
|fame=44
|art=22
|fth=21
|civ=36
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 100 Recruit Tokens consumed, Snail RUSH +1<br>Consumed Recruit Tokens: 5000/5000
|ss2=Per 100 Recruit Tokens consumed, Snail RUSH +2<br>Consumed Recruit Tokens: 5000/5000
|ss3=Per 100 Recruit Tokens consumed, Snail RUSH +3<br>Consumed Recruit Tokens: 5000/5000
|ss4=Per 100 Recruit Tokens consumed, Snail RUSH +5<br>Consumed Recruit Tokens: 5000/5000
|ss7=Per 100 Recruit Tokens consumed, Snail RUSH +5<br>Consumed Recruit Tokens: 5000/5000<br>Snail RUSH +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Dungbeetle skill I.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Water DMG +10
}}
